docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-10-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT URBINA, OMAR DBA  ICS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,400.00 FILED BY VASQUEZ, RAUL AS TO DEFENDANT URBINA, OMAR DBA  ICS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD J. SULLIVAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. HEARD IN DEPT. 318.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, RAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT URBINA, OMAR DBA  ICS $5,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,495.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
